Tdb_X85ph2_V2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 743
Recv ID: 763
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 51
Func Name: Tableau de bord

      },

        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      }
    }
  },

        "firstbyte": 4

        "firstbyte": 4

        "firstbyte": 4

        "firstbyte": 2
      },

        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    },
